.xlsx / .xls accepted

📂 Upload Data Files

Drop each file into its slot below. All four core files are needed for full functionality. The LT Feeder mapping file is optional — load it when ready.

📊
Grid FL Required
Grid → PTR → Feeder → FL hierarchy with feeder load (Amps). Sheet: Detail
—
🔌
DT FL Required
Distribution Transformer ratings & HT current. Sheet: FL-DT rating
—
👥
Consumer Detail Required
CA No, Meter No, Name, Address, GPS coordinates. Sheet: Consumer Mapping
—
🏗
Grid Detail Optional
Supplementary Grid-Feeder-FL mapping. Sheet: Grid-Feeder-FL mapping
—
🗂
LT Feeder Mapping Coming Soon
Substation → LT Feeder → Pole/Pillar mapping. Upload when available.
—
